title: DETACHABLE SIDE STORAGE NACELLE APPARATUS, HEATED SIDE STORAGE NACELLE APPARATUS, SYSTEMS AND METHODS
abstract: An electronic device processing system is provided that includes an equipment front end module, one or more load ports coupled to a front of the equipment front end module, and an indexable side storage pod coupled to a side of the equipment front end module.
claims:
Claims CLAIMS WHAT IS CLAIMED IS: 1. A side storage pod of an equipment front end module, comprising : an outer enclosure having a sealing surface configured to couple to the equipment front end module; a side storage pod chamber having a body with a plurality of vertically-spaced storage members each configured to support a substrate; and an indexer operable to vertically move the side storage pod chamber so that different subgroups of storage members are accessible by a load-unload robot in the equipment front end module. 2. The side storage pod of claim 1 wherein the side storage pod chamber includes a removable door that allows a load-unload robot of the equipment front end module to access the plurality of storage members when the removable door is removed. 3. The side storage pod of claim 1 wherein the side storage pod chamber includes a purge gas supply inlet and an exhaust outlet . 4. The side storage pod of claim 3 wherein the side storage pod chamber includes a gas distribution system that allows a non-reactive gas supplied to the purge gas supply inlet to travel across the vertically-spaced storage members prior to exiting the exhaust outlet. 5. The side storage pod of claim 1 wherein the side storage pod chamber includes at least 50 substrate storage members . 6. The side storage pod of claim 1 wherein the storage members include multiple sub-groups of at least 25 substrate storage members and the indexer is operable to vertically move the side storage pod chamber so that different subgroups of storage members are accessible by a load-unload robot in the equipment front end module. 7. The side storage pod of claim 1 wherein the outer enclosure includes an access door that allows the side storage pod chamber to be removed and replaced by another side storage pod chamber. 8. An electronic device processing system, comprising: an equipment front end module including an equipment front end module chamber; one or more load ports coupled to a front of the equipment front end module, each load port configured to support a substrate carrier; and an indexable side storage pod coupled to a side of the equipment front end module, the indexable side storage pod including : an outer enclosure having a sealing surface configured to couple to the equipment front end module; a side storage pod chamber having a body with a plurality of vertically-spaced storage members each configured to support a substrate; and 

 an indexer operable to vertically move the side storage pod chamber so that different subgroups of storage members are accessible by a load-unload robot in the equipment front end module. 9. The electronic device processing system of claim 8, comprising : an environmental control system coupled to the equipment front end module chamber. 10. The electronic device processing system of claim 9 wherein the outer enclosure of the indexable side storage pod is open to the equipment front end module chamber and the environmental control system controls a common environment in both the outer enclosure of the indexable side storage pod and the equipment front end module chamber. 11. The electronic device processing system of claim 8 wherein the side storage pod chamber includes a purge gas supply inlet, an exhaust outlet and a gas distribution system that allows a non-reactive gas supplied to the purge gas supply inlet to travel across the vertically-spaced storage members prior to exiting the exhaust outlet . 12. The electronic device processing system of claim 8 wherein the storage members include multiple sub-groups of at least 25 substrate storage members and the indexer is operable to vertically move the side storage pod chamber so that different subgroups of storage members are accessible by a load-unload robot in the equipment front end module. 13. A method of processing substrates within an electronic device processing system, comprising: providing an electronic device processing system having : an equipment front end module including an equipment front end module chamber; one or more load ports coupled to a front of the equipment front end module, each load port configured to support a substrate carrier; and an indexable side storage pod coupled to a side o the equipment front end module, the indexable side storage pod including : an outer enclosure having a sealing surface configured to couple to the equipment front end module; a side storage pod chamber having a body wit a plurality of vertically-spaced storage members each configured to support a substrate; and an indexer operable to vertically move the side storage pod chamber so that different subgroups of storage members are accessible by a robot in the equipment front end module; retrieving a substrate positioned on one of the storage members of the side storage pod chamber using the robot within the equipment front end module chamber; and transferring the substrate from the side storage pod chamber to the equipment front end module chamber using the robot . 14. The method of claim 13 wherein retrieving a substrate positioned on one of the storage members of the side storag pod chamber using a robot within the equipment front end 

module chamber includes removing a door of the side storage pod chamber to allow the robot to access the substrate within the side storage pod chamber, and once the substrate is removed, returning the door to the side storage pod chamber to seal the side storage pod chamber. 15. The method of claim 13 wherein the storage members include multiple sub-groups of at least 25 substrate storage members and further comprising using the indexer to vertically move the side storage pod chamber so that different subgroups of storage members are accessible by the robot of the equipment front end module chamber. 16. An electronic device processing system, comprising: an equipment front end module including an equipment front end module chamber; one or more load ports coupled to a front of the equipment front end module, each load port configured to support a substrate carrier; and a side storage pod coupled to a side of the equipment front end module, the side storage pod including: a side storage pod chamber having a body with a plurality of vertically-spaced storage members each configured to support a substrate and an input port; and a heater coupled to the input port of the side storage pod chamber, the heater configured to provide a heated, non-reactive gas flow through the side storage pod chamber and over any substrates stored therein. 17. The electronic device processing system of claim 16, wherein the heated, non-reactive gas is nitrogen. 18. The electronic device processing system of claim 16, wherein the side storage pod chamber includes an exhaust port so that the heated, non-reactive gas may flow through the side storage pod chamber, over any substrates stored therein, and out of the side storage pod chamber. 19. A method of processing substrates within an electronic device processing system, comprising: providing an electronic device processing system including : an equipment front end module including an equipment front end module chamber; one or more load ports coupled to a front of the equipment front end module, each load port configured to support a substrate carrier; a side storage pod coupled to a side of the equipment front end module, the side storage pod further including : a side storage pod chamber having a body with a plurality of vertically-spaced storage members each configured to support a substrate, and a heater coupled to the side storage pod chamber and configured to provide a heated, non-reactive gas to the side storage pod chamber; and flowing the heated, non-reactive gas through the side storage pod chamber and over any substrates stored therein. 20. The method of claim 19, wherein the heated, non- reactive gas that is exposed to the substrates degasses the substrates and allows volatile byproducts located on substrates to be removed. 21. The method of claim 20, further comprising flowing the heated, non-reactive gas and the volatile byproducts out of the side storage pod chamber.
